messages.content: Build a chat message thread state machine in XState v5 using setup() with typed events and context. A message goes from pending to sent or failed, and the user can retry failed messages.
What's the v5 way to model a typing indicator that auto-clears after 3 seconds of inactivity? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly how a chat receive-message pipeline works in XState v5, then show a working typed implementation that pushes incoming messages into context.

Write an XState v5 machine that models an outgoing-message queue where each message has pending/sent/failed status and a retry button re-attempts the last failed one. Constraints: strict types, no `any`, actions declared in setup().

Implement a chat send/receive machine in XState v5 with strict types - no `any`, all events and context typed via setup.types. Model pending -> sent/failed for outgoing messages plus an incoming MESSAGE.RECEIVED event.
Build a search-as-you-type machine in XState v5 using setup() with typed events and context. Debounce the query for 300 ms, then run a promise actor and route to empty/results/error states.
What's the v5 way to cancel a stale search request when the user keeps typing? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly how a debounced search machine handles the empty-query case in XState v5, then show a typed implementation that skips the network call when the query is blank.
Build a search-as-you-type machine in XState v5 that supports min-length gating (don't search for queries shorter than 2 chars). Use setup() with typed events and context.
Fix this XState v4 code to v5 idioms: `after: { 500: { target: 'loading', cond: 'canLoad' } }` with `guards: { canLoad: (ctx, e) => ctx.q.length > 0 }`.
Build a WebSocket connection lifecycle machine in XState v5 using setup() with typed events and context. Cover connecting -> open -> closed/error -> retry with exponential backoff.
What's the v5 way to wrap a socket-like event emitter as a fromCallback actor? Show a minimal example.
Implement a WebSocket retry machine in XState v5 with strict types - no `any`, all events and context typed via setup.types. Cap retries at 5 before landing in a terminal fatal state.
Write an XState v5 machine that manages a WebSocket connection with user-initiated reconnect. Constraints: use enqueueActions, strict types, no inline callbacks.
Build a file upload state machine in XState v5 using setup() with typed events and context. Model queue -> uploading with chunk progress -> paused/complete/error.
What's the v5 way to report chunk-upload progress via emitted events? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly how pause/resume works for a chunked upload in XState v5, then show a typed implementation that preserves progress across pauses.
Write an XState v5 machine that uploads a queue of files one at a time with per-file retry. Constraints: strict types, actors referenced by name in setup.
Build a file upload with chunking machine in XState v5 using setup() with typed events and context. Track bytesUploaded / totalBytes and allow cancel during upload.
Build an offline-aware sync machine in XState v5 using setup() with typed events and context. Track online/offline status in parallel with an outbox that drains when online.
What's the v5 way to model online/offline as a parallel region that gates a sync loop? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly how an outbox reconcile step works in XState v5, then show a typed implementation that retries failed ops before discarding them.
Implement an offline-first write queue in XState v5 with strict types - no `any`, all events and context typed via setup.types. Persist pending ops across online/offline toggles.
Build an offline-sync reconciliation machine in XState v5 using setup() with typed events and context. Detect conflicts when a local op is older than the server version.
Build a notification queue machine in XState v5 using setup() with typed events and context. Each notification auto-dismisses after 4 seconds and the queue pulls the next one.
What's the v5 way to auto-dismiss a toast using after()? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly how named delays work for notifications in XState v5, then show a typed implementation that varies dismiss time by notification priority.
Write an XState v5 machine that drains a notification queue one at a time, auto-dismissing each after 2 seconds. Constraints: guards referenced by name, strict types.
Build a carousel with autoplay state machine in XState v5 using setup() with typed events and context. Support NEXT/PREV with bounds guards and a play/paused parallel region.
What's the v5 way to bound NEXT/PREV transitions on a slider with guards? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly how autoplay pause-on-hover works in XState v5, then show a typed implementation using a parallel play/paused region.
Implement a looping carousel in XState v5 with strict types - no `any`, all events and context typed via setup.types. NEXT at the last slide wraps to 0; PREV at 0 wraps to the last slide.
Write an XState v5 machine that models a slider with keyboard navigation (ARROW_LEFT / ARROW_RIGHT). Constraints: enqueueActions, guards in setup, strict types.
Build a carousel autoplay machine in XState v5 that stops autoplay once the user reaches the last slide. Use setup() with typed events and context.
